productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black Striped Shirt
description: Composition Black and white pinstriped half-sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has tape detailing on the inside of the neck, two patch pockets on the chest, buttoned shoulder flap, front button placket and stitch detailing along the hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water at 30 C with mild detergent Turn garment inside out for washing and drying Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron Revel in the casual comfort of half sleeve shirts with this one from united colors of benetton. Class and comfort come together in this shirt to make you look handsome. Pair it with chinos or corduroys and sport a great look. Size and Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
